layout.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-16 for main sections. gap-8 for grids.
layout.cards: Flat, no soft drop shadows. Use 1px sharp borders border-[#2C1E16]/15. 4 cards on desktop, 2 on mobile.
layout.corners: Subtle curves, rounded-md or rounded-lg maximum. Avoid pill shapes unless it's a specific badge.

components.buttons: Solid primary or outline. Use tracking-wide, uppercase, Outfit font. text-sm. Example: hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform.
components.inputs: Shadcn defaults but remove default blue ring. Use focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#2C1E16].
components.cards: Hover states must have slight lift and image zoom. Image wrapper overflow-hidden.
components.navigation: Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FAFAF7]/80, sticky top-0, z-50, 1px bottom border.

animations.page_load: Fade in and slight slide up (y: 20 -> 0).
animations.interaction: Micro-interactions on hover (scale 1.05 for images inside cards).

testing.requirements: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button').

features.cake_weight_selection: Implement radio group or toggle buttons for 500g, 1kg, 1.5kg, 2kg. Dynamically change price text when changed.
features.waitlist_system: If in-stock is false, replace 'Add to Cart' with 'Join Waitlist'. Show waitlist status in Dashboard.
features.admin_panel: Use a condensed data grid for cakes, stock, orders. Hide emotional design elements here and focus on utility.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the JSON object configuration for colors, fonts, and images.
Use Shadcn UI for complex components like dropdowns, selects, and dialogs. Style them to match the pastel & soft aesthetic.
Use pure Tailwind/HTML for the homepage hero and product card layouts. Avoid Shadcn Card where creative layout is needed.
Implement Framer Motion for scroll animations and hover interactions.
Install and use lucide-react for standard icons.
Use the exact media URLs provided under the 'media' property.
Add data-testid attributes to all form inputs, buttons, and links.
